31.caption: SNMP Version
31.description: Version of SNMP used by the device

32.caption: [NX] SSH Backend
32.description: Set the backend used (Default: 'sshcli') Can be: sshcli, plink, libssh.

33.caption: [NX] SSH Password
33.description: Login with specified password. Cannot be used with 'sshcli' backend.

35.caption: [NX] SSH Priv Key
35.description: Private key file for user authentication.

164.caption: [NX] Applications list
164.description: List of applications the Host Object is part of

165.caption: [NX] Enable NEP Extras
165.description: Enable the monitoring extras service set for the host. Some external repos may be required.

166.caption: [NX] Enable NEP SS
166.description: Apply default Service Sets from NEP to this Host Object

168.caption: [NX] NEP SS to exclude
168.description: List of SS from NEP that should NOT be applied to this Host Object

169.caption: [NX] NetEye Tenant
169.description: Tenant name where search data (like namespace for ElasticAgent)

170.caption: [NX] Active channels
170.description: Notification Channels used to send notifications

171.caption: [NX] Time initial delay
171.description: The time NetEye waits before sending notifications about a change of object's state.

172.caption: [NX] Recipient groups list
172.description:
Groups of Users that will receive notifications from this Host/Service.
To avoid sending multiple notifications to the same user, ensure the User is contained by only one Group and is not listed in the Recipients List.

173.caption: [NX] Time repetition interval
173.description: The time NetEye waits before re-sending notifications about a change of object's state.

174.caption: [NX] Notification's mode
174.description: Determines the way notifications are sent for the Host and its Services

175.caption: [NX] Recipients list
175.description:
Users that will receive notifications from this Host/Service.
To avoid sending multiple notifications to the same user, ensure the User is not contained in any Group specified in in the Group recipients List.

176.caption: [NX] Behavior on Parent host down
176.description: Describes what happens in case one or more Host Parents become down.

177.caption: [NX] Departments' List
177.description: Lost of Departments this Object belongs to.

179.caption: [NX] Parent Hosts
179.description:
List of Parent Hosts for the current Host Object.
This list will be used to create a basic parent-child relationship between this Host Object and the ones selected.

180.caption: [NX] Public Cloud Tenant ID
180.description: Tenant ID of Public Cloud on which the host belong

181.caption: [NX] Object roles list
181.description: List of roles this Object fulfill

182.caption: [NX] Severity
182.description: Severity level for host or service

[NX] Organization details.description: Details about Company Organizational Units that manages the Object

[NX] Basic notifications Settings.description: Common settings for Basic NEP Notifications

[NX] Basic notifications Settings (Advan.description: Advanced settings for Basic NEP Notifications
